project.name: 键盘弹钢琴

intentProfile.routingReason: User provided a long PRD for a piano web game UI, no restoration target, no active Design Library

project.styleDefinitionBrief: Immersive piano web game, deep purple #6d28d9 primary with pink/cyan game-semantic accents, dark theme default, Outfit + JetBrains Mono, 3D piano + particles, starry/sakura/cyber presets.
project.designRead: Game UI / casual players & music lovers / immersive cool tone / balanced density / avoid generic card walls

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: Purple #6d28d9/#8b5cf6 is the single brand primary, used for main CTAs, selected states, and brand identity
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: Free-explore single-hue: purple is the only brand hue. Pink #db2777 and cyan #0891b2 are game-semantic state colors (judgment tiers, style presets), not secondary/accent brand hues

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: Restrained radius: sm=4px, md=8px, lg=16px, full=9999px. No radius above 16px.
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Display/Body: Outfit + Noto Sans SC + PingFang SC fallback. Mono: JetBrains Mono. Avoid Inter/Roboto.
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: Standard 4px base grid. Generous whitespace in showcase pages, tighter in app-shell game pages.
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: Piano keyboard component with 7 white + 5 black keys, key letter labels. HUD with mono digits. Falling notes with key labels. Cardless layouts preferred.
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: Static surfaces use border/surface layering first. Shadow alpha <= 0.05 for static, higher only for floating layers. Dark theme: card=#16132a on bg=#0d0b1a.
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: 1 hero image (starry piano). Song covers use CSS gradients + Lucide music icon. No emoji as functional icons.
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: Responsive key press feedback, judgment popups, particle bursts on hit. prefers-reduced-motion respected.

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: Top bar: Logo '键琴' left, mode nav center (首页/曲库/设置), style quick-switch + help right. Immersive background layer behind all pages.
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: Single purple primary #8b5cf6 (dark) / #6d28d9 (light). Pink/cyan are game-semantic only.
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Outfit display/body + JetBrains Mono for HUD/keys. Noto Sans SC CJK fallback.
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: Border-first static surfaces, shadow alpha <= 0.05. Dark theme card on darker bg.
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: Primary CTA: purple bg, white text, radius-md. Secondary: border only, no fill.
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: Left-aligned content with max-width container. Game pages use full-viewport app-shell.

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Deep purple primary, pink/cyan game-semantic, dark immersive theme, Outfit+JetBrains Mono, 3D piano+particles

pages.title: 首页
pages.businessScenario: Entry point: mode selection, song recommendations, new user guide
pages.visualNorthStar: Full-screen starry gradient with 3D piano silhouette, bold title, immersive first impression
pages.compositionPattern: Full-bleed hero with starry particle canvas, editorial columns for mode selection
continuityAnchors: top bar with logo and nav
qualityRisks: avoid card wall for mode selection

pages.title: 自由弹奏
pages.businessScenario: Free play sandbox: piano keyboard, 3D visual, octave switch, timbre selector, recording
pages.visualNorthStar: App-shell with 3D perspective piano center stage, particle bursts on key press, dark immersive
pages.compositionPattern: Three-column app-shell: left controls, center stage, right info
qualityRisks: Three.js canvas must not break DOM

pages.title: 跟弹打分
pages.businessScenario: Follow-play scoring: falling notes, judgment line, HUD with score/combo/accuracy
pages.visualNorthStar: Synthesia-style vertical falling notes aligned to piano keyboard, glowing judgment line, vibrant HUD
pages.compositionPattern: App-shell with HUD top bar, falling notes highway center, piano keyboard bottom
qualityRisks: falling notes must align with keyboard columns
judgment popups must use state colors

pages.title: AI 转谱
pages.businessScenario: AI transcription: upload audio, progress, result preview with note count/BPM, enter follow-play
pages.visualNorthStar: Three-stage task flow: upload → progress → result, with clean sections and mono digit stats
pages.compositionPattern: Vertical sections: upload zone, progress bar, result stats, CTA

pages.title: 曲库
pages.businessScenario: Song library: grid of songs with difficulty/BPM/duration, search, filter, select to play
pages.visualNorthStar: Clean grid of CSS-gradient song covers with metadata, bottom action bar on select
pages.compositionPattern: Auto-fill grid with filter bar above, fixed action bar below
continuityAnchors: top bar with nav active=曲库
qualityRisks: grid must not become card wall
song covers use CSS gradients not images

pages.title: 结算
pages.businessScenario: Score results: big score, grade, stats, accuracy trend chart, retry/share
pages.visualNorthStar: Centered score display with large mono digits, S-grade badge, four-color judgment distribution bar, Chart.js trend
pages.compositionPattern: Centered vertical sections: score hero, stats row, chart, actions
continuityAnchors: judgment tier colors in distribution bar

pages.title: 设置
pages.businessScenario: Settings: visual style presets, audio config, accessibility, about
pages.visualNorthStar: Left nav + right settings area, 3 style preset cards with gradient samples, clean form controls
pages.compositionPattern: Two-column: sticky left nav, scrollable right settings sections
continuityAnchors: top bar with nav active=设置
qualityRisks: style presets must show visual difference

assets.semanticDescription: Starry night sky with a 3D perspective piano keyboard silhouette, purple to pink gradient atmosphere, particles
